description_long: This is a compact, wall-mounted ceramic sink with a rounded front and a flat rear edge designed to fit snugly against a wall. The basin is deep and smoothly contoured, with a central drain at the bottom and a single faucet mounted at the rear center. The faucet is a modern, single-lever design, and the plumbing, including the P-trap, is visible beneath the basin. The exterior surface is glossy and reflective, typical of glazed ceramic, and the overall form is streamlined for efficient use of space. The sink is primarily white or light gray, with metallic accents on the faucet and plumbing. This type of fixture is commonly found in public restrooms, urban parks, or compact residential bathrooms.
description: A glossy, wall-mounted ceramic sink with a rounded basin, central drain, and single-lever faucet, featuring visible plumbing beneath. The design is compact and modern, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded basin, central faucet, and visible drain opening.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the basin and the exposed plumbing underneath.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back for wall mounting and the full plumbing assembly.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the faucet and plumbing from the opposite angle.
